qids.subject: Computer Organization & Architecture
qids.prose: Consider a -way set associative cache (initially empty) with total cache blocks. The main memory consists of blocks and the request for memory blocks are in the following order: Which one of the following memory block will NOT be in cache if LRU replacement policy is used? A. B. C. D.
